## Summary

- What changed?
- Why is this change needed?

## Scope

- [ ] This change stays within the public paper-mode boundary of the repo
- [ ] This change does not expose secrets, private infrastructure, or live-trading enablement

## Validation

- [ ] Tests added or updated where practical
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or public interfaces changed
- [ ] Risks and rollback notes included below

## Risks

Describe behavior changes, migration risk, or anything reviewers should check carefully.

## Related Issues

Link issues, discussions, or design docs here.
